HD2020 Gen6 brightness frame (Hd2020Cmd::Brightness, 0x03), level = 0x80.
Bytes: a5 03 01 00 80 84
  a5           start / resync byte
  03           cmd = Brightness
  01 00        len = 1 (u16 little-endian)
  80           payload = brightness level 128
  84           checksum = (0x03 + 0x01 + 0x00 + 0x80) & 0xff

Provenance: design-derived, hand-constructed from the HD2020 frame layout in
`hd2020::frame` (DESIGN.md §6), 2026-07-19. The start byte, command numbering,
length span, and checksum are placeholders — no capture or Go reference
(hd2020_gen6_test.go) was available. Reconcile against the Go reference or a
real HD2020 Gen6 device before locking.
